text: nghe noi co the sap nhap tiep, khong biet co that khong
tinh minh co nam trong dot sap nhap tiep theo khong ta
neu sap nhap tiep thi giay to cu co phai doi lai het khong
co ai biet chinh xac bao gio cong bo dot sap nhap moi khong
nghe don la co nhung chua thay van ban chinh thuc, ai biet khong
khong biet tin sap nhap tiep nay that hay gia, ai xac nhan giup voi
co nguon nao chinh thuc noi ve viec thanh hoa giam xa chua ta
nghe ban be noi vay thoi chu chua thay bao dai nao dua tin sap nhap tiep
lieu co that su sap nhap tiep con 16 tinh khong hay chi la don thoi
chua thay van ban chinh thuc nao ve vu thanh hoa, co ai ro khong
nghe noi tren group vay thoi, khong biet dung sai the nao
co chac khong hay lai la tin don nhu lan truoc vay ta
minh thay nguoi ta ban tan sap nhap tiep nhung chua kiem chung duoc
co ai lam trong so noi vu xac nhan giup vu sap nhap tiep khong
nghe dau vay ha, khong ro nguon tin ve vu 16 tinh tu dau ma ra
